response.original_title: The Last One: Unfolding the AIDS Memorial Quilt
response.overview: The Last One presents an updated history of the AIDS epidemic in America through the story of the AIDS Memorial Quilt. The film traces how what at first was labeled a "gay disease" now disproportionately impacts the African American community, including women and youth.
response.tagline: Promoting AIDS awareness, with the hope that the last quilt panel will one day become a reality.
response.title: The Last One: Unfolding the AIDS Memorial Quilt
